title: Populate clips.json with recorded clips and labels
description: Add an entry to the clips array in clips.json for each MP3 with its file path and on-screen label caption. Once clips has entries the robot fallbacks are ignored.

title: Convert recordings to MP3 and add to audio/
description: Convert the recorded clips to MP3 and drop them into the audio/ folder using kebab-case names, e.g. audio/because-i-said-so.mp3.

title: Record dad-ism audio clips
description: Record short clips (2–5s each) of Dad saying his catchphrases. Keep same room, same mic, and consistent volume across all recordings for a uniform feel. Source list of phrases lives in clips.json fallbacks.

title: Install on phones and verify offline mode
description: Open the hosted URL on phones, use Add to Home Screen to install fullscreen, and verify the app plays clips and works offline after first load.

title: Host the app over HTTPS
description: Deploy the folder to a free HTTPS host (GitHub Pages, Netlify Drop, or Cloudflare Pages). HTTPS is required to unlock Add to Home Screen install + offline mode.
notes: Pages deploy workflow added (.github/workflows/pages.yml). BLOCKED on manual step: enable Settings > Pages > Source = 'GitHub Actions'. Live URL will be https://abwerks.github.io/DadWisdon/. Close once first deploy succeeds.
close_reason: Deployed via GitHub Actions workflow (auto-enabled Pages). Live at https://abwerks.github.io/DadWisdon/ — all assets (index, clips.json, sw.js, manifest, icons) return 200.

title: Bump CACHE_VERSION in sw.js after adding clips
description: Increment CACHE_VERSION in sw.js (e.g. v1 → v2) so installed/offline devices re-download the new audio clips instead of serving stale cache.

title: Build physical hardware button version
description: Later: reuse the audio/ MP3 library on an SD card for a DFPlayer Mini (+ button + speaker, ~$10) or a Raspberry Pi build to make a physical one-button device.
